data.name: ETERNAL ROMANCE Complete Edition Plus
data.detailed_description:
Traditional Chinese support are currently in development.

繁體中文：開發中

■ Story

The protagonist Sophie, is cursed by the succubus Fara, causing her to become constantly aroused.

In order to lift the curse, Sophie sets out on a journey to find Fara…

■ Game System

This is a 2D side-scrolling action game.

You defeat enemies using normal attacks, skills, and lewd attacks.

Enemies not only use standard attacks, but also perform lewd attacks.

When the protagonist is hit by an enemy’s grapple attack, she enters to an Excited State.

If she is grappled again while aroused, she will be subjected to an erotic attack.

The protagonist can also perform grapple attacks, and by executing an lewd attack on the enemy.

■ About the Sex

Almost all enemies are futanari girls.

There are 44 different enemy characters, each with their own unique erotic animations.

In certain event scenes, the protagonist herself may also become a futanari.

There are a total of 66 animation types (including event scenes).

Demo version does not allow you to use the gallery.

This application uses "Live2D" by Live2D Inc.

data.short_description: This is a 2D side-scrolling action game in which a futanari girl get ejaculated and/or ejaculate. The protagonist Sophie, is cursed by the succubus Fara, causing her to become constantly aroused. In order to lift the curse, Sophie sets out on a journey to find Fara…

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows11,10
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
